title: Coarsen Semantic Reinforcement Memory buckets and add batched LLM fine-tuned topic naming

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting implementation test-first. Plan: (1) add BDD spec scenarios for coarser bucket controls and batched one-call LLM topic naming, (2) implement VectorTopicMemory batching path to send all topic keyword+exemplar bundles in one LLM request with distinct-name instructions, configurable model (default gpt-4o for batch labels), (3) add coarsening controls in clustering config and update report template defaults to produce coarser buckets, (4) run focused tests and then update active run tasks with rerun guidance.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Context gathered from vector_topic_memory.py and TopicAnalysis fine-tuning flow. Next step: add failing BDD-style specs for (1) stronger coarse bucket sizing behavior and (2) batched one-pass LLM topic naming that returns distinct names for all selected buckets in a single call.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Writing BDD-first failing tests now: coarse clustering defaults (less fragmented buckets) and one-pass batched LLM naming with distinct-name instructions + configurable model.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: BDD red phase complete. Added failing specs in vector_topic_memory_test.py for: (1) coarse clustering-control defaults and override behavior, (2) one-pass batched LLM topic naming with distinct/nuance prompt requirements. Current targeted run: 4 failing tests (missing new methods). Moving to implementation.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementation complete for this slice. Added in VectorTopicMemory: (1) resolve_clustering_controls with coarser defaults (coarse_min_topic_fraction=0.02, coarse_target_max_topics_per_score=12) while preserving explicit overrides; (2) one-pass batched LLM naming (label.batch_one_pass, label.batch_model, optional label.batch_prompt) that sends all selected buckets in one call and enforces distinct nuanced names; (3) safe fallback to per-topic naming if batch call fails. Updated report templates score_result_no_vector_topic_memory_report.md and vector_topic_memory_report.md to use coarse controls plus batch naming config. Validation: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q plexus/reports/blocks/vector_topic_memory_test.py => 18 passed.
